response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC of 11.5% is below my 50% sharing threshold and critical—accepting outbound transfers violates conservative policy; prioritize inbound aggregator requests instead.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a OFFER from r0c1. Payload: {'kwh': 0.625}. Their rationale: SoC 16.12/39 kWh (0.41 frac) above 0.35 threshold; sharing 2.50 kW via geographic circle to below-mean-SoC peer..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=['r3c3'].
Your latest belief: I am in critical blackout risk (SoC 11.5% usable, ~14 min to depletion); neighborhood is resource-constrained; r3c3 has repeatedly rejected my requests and is distrusted; only viable path is immediate inbound transfers from aggregator/owner..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
